title: gomortegaceae
intro: The Gomortegaceae is a family of flowering plants that consists of two genera, Gomortega and Discocoryne. This family is primarily found in the subtropical and temperate regions of the Americas, and its members are characterized by their unique combination of characteristics. Gomortegaceae plants often have broad leaves and produce small, greenish-yellow flowers that are often arranged in clusters. The family is relatively small, with only a few species recognized within the two genera.
